reasoning: This animation sequence depicts the joyful expression of popping a party popper.  It uses dynamic arm movements to simulate the excitement and energy of the event. The sequence will alternate between dramatic arm positions to create a sense of playful chaos and excitement. Frame 1 starts with the arms extended outward in a wide 'V' shape, palms facing upward as if holding the popper.  Frame 2 shows the arms retracting slightly, creating anticipation before the explosion. Frame 3 depicts the 'explosion' itself, with arms shooting upward and outward, palms facing downward. Frame 4 shows a brief pause, with arms in a celebratory pose. Frame 5 brings the arms back to a relaxed position, signaling the end of the celebration.
